goal: Implement DEV-020 API runtime PostgreSQL adapter/cutover boundary in the current working tree without production writes, hardcoded credentials, UI/menu changes, or permission/AI boundary changes.

included: project docs, runbook, DEV-020/AUDIT-020, runtime memory

changes.summary: Added memory/file/postgres modes, PostgreSQL config validation, file fallback and no-live-write PostgreSQL adapter boundary.
Added focused tests for mode resolution, file fallback, PostgreSQL config validation, missing-env failure and boundary save failure.
Added runtime_data_documents table for the current RuntimeData JSON shape cutover boundary.
Updated runtime store mode, PostgreSQL boundary config, migration, backup, recovery and rollback guidance.

next_action: Open PR and wait for required checks/review. Do not treat DEV-020 as real PostgreSQL production cutover until driver-backed writes, migration/backfill, backup/restore drill, production smoke and release signoff are complete.
